_comment: Slideshow theme (PPT Presentation View) — region schema (ADR-0045 Decision #2). v2.0.0: PPT transformation — full style compatibility, profile/contact slide_types added, content_rules relaxed (max_bullets 3→4, max_title_chars 20→28).
name: slideshow
description: PPT-style fullscreen single-slide presentation with thumbnail navigation panel, transition effects (fade/push/zoom), speaker script panel, and footer navigation bar. One slide active at a time with smooth animated transitions. Includes punchline slide type for impactful closing statements.

rendering.navigation: thumbnail panel + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer

content_rules.notes: Fullscreen layout suits concise messaging. Titles up to 28 chars. Max 4 bullets per slide. Punchline slides for impactful single-statement closers. Speaker script field shown in presenter panel.

partial_styles.name: visual-heavy
partial_styles.reason: Full-bleed background images may conflict with rounded-card layout. Works for cover/divider slides; avoid for text-dense content.

recommended_structure.notes: Optimized for fast transitions. Each 'chapter' = one topic + detail slides + punchline. Use speaker script for talking points.

author: co-deck
